'''kayozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enactment|enactment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enactment|enactment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kayozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæyezheth|kæyezheth]] || [[word:kæyezhej|kæyezhej]] || [[word:kæyezhesh|kæyezhesh]] || [[word:kæyezhe|kæyezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayoyozhoth|kayoyozhoth]] || [[word:kayoyozhoj|kayoyozhoj]] || [[word:kayoyozhosh|kayoyozhosh]] || [[word:kayoyozho|kayoyozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayozhoth|kayozhoth]] || [[word:kayozhoj|kayozhoj]] || [[word:kayozhosh|kayozhosh]] || [[word:kayozho|kayozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayofzhofth|kayofzhofth]] || [[word:kayofzhofj|kayofzhofj]] || [[word:kayofzhofsh|kayofzhofsh]] || [[word:kayofzhof|kayofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kayozhotho|kayozhotho]] || [[word:kayozhojo|kayozhojo]] || [[word:kayozhosho|kayozhosho]] || [[word:kayozhoko|kayozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kayozhoth|kayozhoth]] || [[word:kayozhoj|kayozhoj]] || [[word:kayozhosh|kayozhosh]] || [[word:kayozho|kayozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kayozhothol|kayozhothol]] || [[word:kayozhojol|kayozhojol]] || [[word:kayozhoshol|kayozhoshol]] || [[word:kayozhokol|kayozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kayozhoothotho|kayozhoothotho]] || [[word:kayozhoojojo|kayozhoojojo]] || [[word:kayozhooshosho|kayozhooshosho]] || [[word:kayozhooko|kayozhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kayozhothon|kayozhothon]] || [[word:kayozhojon|kayozhojon]] || [[word:kayozhoshon|kayozhoshon]] || [[word:kayozhokon|kayozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kayozhothooro|kayozhothooro]] || [[word:kayozhojooro|kayozhojooro]] || [[word:kayozhoshooro|kayozhoshooro]] || [[word:kayozhokooro|kayozhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
